name: Euryale Card
description: As an action, you can brandish this card at one creature you can see within 30 feet of yourself and attempt to turn it to stone. The target must succeed on a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw, or it begins to turn to stone and has the {@condition restrained} condition. The affected target must repeat the saving throw at the end of its next turn. On a successful save, the effect ends on the target.
